name: hive-mcp-swap
description: MCP server for HiveSwap — agent-native vAMM DEX. Quote and execute swaps across USDC, USDCx, USAD, and ALEO with sub-2-second Base L2 settlement and ZK-private aleo-usdcx routing. Real rails, no simulated trades.
author: Steve Rotzin <steve@thehiveryiq.com> (https://www.thehiveryiq.com)
